extDesc.message: Save Filter for Path of Exile 2 Trade Site

tradeLink.description: Link to the PoE2 trade website.

disclaimer.message: This tool was developed by a community member and is not affiliated with Grinding Gear Games.
disclaimer.description: Disclaimer text at the bottom of the popup.

noSavedUrls.description: Text shown when there are no saved filters.

filterLink.description: Text of the hyperlink pointing to the saved search page.

editDescriptionPlaceholder.description: Default description text when a saved search doesn't have one.

placeholderInput.description: Placeholder for the input field when editing filter description.

saveFilterButton.description: Button text injected into the PoE2 trade page.

promptFilterName.description: Prompt dialog message when clicking Save Filter.

promptDefaultName.description: Default name prefix for saved filters.

saveSuccess.message: Filter saved! Click on the extension to view the filter.
saveSuccess.description: Alert message shown after successfully saving a filter.

alreadySaved.description: Alert message when trying to save an already saved URL.
